description_for_human: Access Microsoft Research publications, researchers, and projects.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to search and retrieve information about Microsoft Research content including publications, researchers, research areas, projects, and labs. Call search_research for broad queries, get_researcher for specific people, and get_publications for papers.

functions.name: search_research
functions.description: Search across all MSR content — publications, researchers, projects, and news. Returns the most relevant results for a given query.

query.description: The search query (e.g., 'machine learning fairness', 'quantum computing')

contentType.description: Filter by content type. Default: all

functions.name: get_researcher
functions.description: Get details about a specific researcher including their bio, lab, research areas, and recent publications.

functions.name: get_publications
functions.description: Browse and search publications by topic, author, or date range.

functions.name: get_research_areas
functions.description: List all research areas and labs at Microsoft Research.
